prompt: Create a high-quality realistic anime-style 3D illustration of a young female tennis player on an outdoor tennis court in bright midday sunlight. She has short glossy chestnut-brown bob hair with soft bangs, while her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth square blur censor block. Show her full body in a dynamic ready stance with legs spread wide, torso leaning slightly, right arm extended outward for balance, and left hand holding a blue-and-white tennis racket angled downward. She wears a fitted white sleeveless athletic tennis dress with a scoop neckline, a pleated mini skirt, subtle blue sports logos on the chest and skirt, a white wristband with a small blue mark, white ankle socks, and chunky white tennis shoes with faint pastel blue accents. The scene is a blue hard-court tennis court with crisp white boundary lines, a tennis net behind her, a chain-link fence in the background, green trees beyond the fence, and a clear blue sky with soft white clouds. Use a slightly low, full-body portrait composition, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric folds, glossy hair highlights, soft skin shading, natural shadows on the court, vibrant summer colors, and polished gpt-image-2 photoreal anime rendering.
